steps.title: Use the location note
steps.content: The student wants to indicate the location of the Isthmus of Panama. The notes state that it is located in Central America and connects North America to South America.

steps.title: State where it is
steps.content: A names the isthmus without locating it. C defines an isthmus generally. D explains what an isthmus does but still omits the location. The choice that says Central America directly meets the goal. The answer is B.
